overall.description: Game engine footage from a maritime simulation showing first-person perspective from a boat's bridge at night. The vessel navigates through choppy open waters while radar and GPS navigation displays are visible overhead, with the radar sweep rotating continuously.

scene_state.functional_zone: boat bridge navigating open coastal waters at night

events.description: navigation marker pole briefly appears on the port side as the boat passes the marker

agents.ego_description: piloting the vessel from the bridge, monitoring the rotating radar and GPS navigation displays while maintaining course through rough seas

entered.detail: three-screen console array showing GPS chart plotter, rotating radar display, and depth sounder
forward metal deck with safety railings and bow equipment extending into the water
dark choppy water with visible wave motion extending to the horizon
metal safety railing along the left side of the deck
metal safety railing along the right side of the deck

segments.scene_description: The scene presents a continuous nighttime navigation sequence from a boat's bridge. The vessel moves steadily through choppy waters while the radar display rotates continuously overhead. The GPS chart shows coastal proximity, and the metal deck structure is visible extending forward into the dark ocean.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous nighttime navigation sequence from a boat's bridge as the vessel pushes steadily through a dark, turbulent ocean. It begins with a view of the metal deck structure extending forward into the choppy waters, where the rhythmic motion of the waves dominates the foreground. As the camera maintains its forward trajectory, the focus shifts slightly upward to the glowing navigation equipment, where a radar sweep rotates continuously overhead. The scene then integrates the digital glow of the GPS chart, which reveals the vessel's proximity to the coast while the boat continues its journey into the deep night.
